tasks.spec: You are a worker proving an execution lane end to end. Do exactly one thing: create a file named proof.md in your current task directory whose entire contents are the single line: RINGER OPENCODE LANE OK. Do not create any other files, do not modify anything else, and write nothing before or after that line.
tasks.check: grep -qx 'RINGER OPENCODE LANE OK' proof.md || { echo 'FAIL: proof.md is missing the exact marker line. Contents were:'; cat proof.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(no proof.md was written)'; exit 1; }
tasks.verified: proof.md contains the exact marker line, proving the OpenCode + OpenRouter (GLM-5.2) worker was authenticated, executed, and wrote a file to its task directory.
